title: Obsiderite
description: This is a mod that adds end-game tools and armor that are made of obsidian, netherite, and end stone.
body: This Mod adds gear and items for those who want to get anything better than netherite. these items require netherite, obsidian, and end stone to obtain. The items added include, basic minecraft tools and armor, (sword, axe, pickaxe, shovel, hoe) as well as a battle axe which is slow, but does a large amount of damage. The next item is the spear, which you can throw, and it drops when it hits the ground. The armor added has stats of 6 armor for the helmet and boots, 16 armour for the chestplate, and 10 armor for the leggings. The last thing added was the staffs that shoot different things depending what you made them with.
